---
title: "Quentin André"
subtitle: "Assistant Professor of Marketing"
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image: images/avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:quentin.andre@colorado.edu
      aria-label: Email
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/andre_quentin
      aria-label: Twitter
    - icon: google
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=FWaxM6MAAAAJ&hl=en
      aria-label: Google Scholar
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/QuentinAndre
      aria-label: GitHub
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      href: files/vita.pdf
      aria-label: CV
listing:
  - id: recent-publications
    contents: publications/*/index.qmd
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    max-description-length: 200
    fields: [image, date, title, description]
    image-height: 120px
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: posts/*/index.qmd
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    max-description-length: 150
    fields: [image, date, title, description]
    image-height: 120px
  - id: recent-software
    contents: software/*/index.qmd
    type: default
    sort: false
    max-items: 6
    max-description-length: 120
    fields: [title, description]
toc: false
---

:::{#about}

I am an Assistant Professor of Marketing at the [Leeds School of Business, University of Colorado Boulder](https://www.colorado.edu/business/quentin-andre).

My research focuses on judgment and decision making in general, with a special interest in consumer
financial decision-making, numerical cognition, and probabilistic reasoning. I also care about open-science, replicability, and reproducibility.

On this website, I share a summary of my current projects and publications, tools and software that I have
 programmed, and occasional thoughts and tutorials on various research-related topics.

**Interests:** Financial Decision-Making, Probabilistic Reasoning, Numerical Cognition, Open Science

**Education:**

- PhD in Marketing — INSEAD, France (2018)
- MSc in Managerial and Financial Economics — HEC Paris, France (2012)
- Bachelor in History of Arts — Sorbonne University, France (2009)

:::

## Recent Publications

:::{#recent-publications}
:::

[See all publications →](publications/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

## Recent Blog Posts

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

[See all posts →](posts/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

## Software

:::{#recent-software}
:::

[See all software →](software/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
